name: CorMedix Inc.
summary: PART I Overview CorMedix Inc. (collectively, with our wholly owned subsidiaries, referred to herein as we, us, our or the Company) is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapeutic products for life-threatening diseases and conditions. Our primary focus has been commercializing DefenCath (taurolidine and heparin), in the U.S., which we launched in 2024 in the hemodialysis setting.
